nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 小种群风险
nodes.summary: 种群规模过小导致遗传多样性下降和脆弱性上升。

nodes.name: 莫桑比克
nodes.summary: 莫桑比克是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联154种鸟类，包括南非鸭、Shelley's francolin、Natal spurfowl等154种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: CR
nodes.summary: CR表示 IUCN 极危等级，当前关联174种鸟类，如勺嘴鹬、加州神鹫、菲律宾鹰等174种鸟类。

nodes.name: Long-billed forest warbler
nodes.summary: Long-billed forest warbler（Long-billed forest warbler，学名 Artisornis moreaui），在图谱中标记为极危（CR）物种，主要分布于坦桑尼亚、莫桑比克，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、小种群风险。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 坦桑尼亚
nodes.summary: 坦桑尼亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联307种鸟类，包括南非鸭、Eastern crested guinea fowl、Shelley's francolin等307种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in Tanzania and Mozambique

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in Tanzania and Mozambique

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is threatened by habitat destruction

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: On this basis, the International Union for Conservation of Nature has assessed its conservation status as being "critically endangered"; however if its range turns out to be more extensive than is currently recognised, its rating is likely to be lowered to a less threatened category. The total population of the Mozambique forest warbler is conservatively estimated to include 50-249 mature individuals, but may be more numerous, and is considered stable. It is classified as endangered based on its small population and limited range. In 1945 the British ornithologist Constantine Benson identified a second population from bird skins collected by Jali Makawa in the Njesi Highlands of northern Mozambique
